design_notes: The chart matches the synthwave pacing with high precision, mapping the density directly to the track's energy levels. In high-energy bars, a rhythmic sequence of 3 taps is featured, alternating naturally across the three lanes. In the lower-energy breaks, the density drops to a single tap or hold to allow the player to breathe. Sustained synth-leads are caught with comfortable, two-beat holds that keep other lanes clear to preserve the casual flow.

sections.name: S0
sections.intent: Follow the fluctuating energy peaks and valleys with matching step densities, utilizing clean lane switches and spacious holds on sustained leads.
